MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jay Harker, Esq. 949-260-3100 of Clausen Miller, P.C. for Plaintiff through Court Call.
George Wolff, Esq. 415-788-1881 x222 Moving party.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court shares views and concerns re: future hearing dates. Moving party argues financial and communication problems. Defendant's Counsel does not foresee opposing a trial continuance. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

LAW OFFICE OF GEORGE WOLFF, ATTY. GEORGE WOLFF'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL.

Denied without Prejudice. Counsel for Defendant is to appear at the mandatory settlement conference. If the case does not settle, Counsel will request to continue the trial and can renew the motion. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
